---
title: "nitrix.metrics.information"
generated: true
signature-hash: bc01d813d5dc8c36
description: "Information-theoretic and variance-ratio image-similarity metrics."
listing:
  id: nitrix-metrics-information-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-metrics-information/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.metrics.information`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Information-theoretic and variance-ratio image-similarity metrics.

The cross-modal workhorses (T1 <-> T2, EPI <-> T1, ...), where intensities
are related by an unknown -- possibly non-monotonic -- mapping:

- [`joint_histogram`](nitrix-metrics-information/joint_histogram.qmd) -- a differentiable (Parzen / linear soft-binned)
  joint intensity histogram.
- [`mutual_information`](nitrix-metrics-information/mutual_information.qmd) -- mutual information (and normalised mutual
  information) from the joint histogram.
- [`mi_grad`](nitrix-metrics-information/mi_grad.qmd) -- the closed-form Mattes gradient
  $\partial\mathrm{MI}/\partial\mathrm{moving}$, an analytic gradient
  that replaces the `jax.grad(mutual_information)` autodiff tape.
- [`correlation_ratio`](nitrix-metrics-information/correlation_ratio.qmd) -- Roche's $\eta^2$ between-group variance
  ratio, which assumes only a *functional* (not affine) intensity
  relationship.

Differentiability is via the smooth soft-binning weights (the bin *index* is
piecewise-constant, but its gradient is zero almost everywhere; the gradient
flows through the interpolation weights).  All return a scalar.  By
convention, mutual information, normalised mutual information, and the
correlation ratio are *similarities* -- maximise them, or minimise the
negative (or the $1 - \eta^2$ complement of the correlation ratio).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `bins` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-metrics-information-symbols}
:::
